plans._status_line: Planned 5 stills + 5 motion clips · locked hero HERO_PUSH_IN · prioritised spec-driven assets · ready for Visual Brief
plans.campaign_angle: 40.35mm exact. 0.7mm lip. FKM rubber. No drilling.

asset_strategy.primary_goal: Demonstrate engineering precision and material authenticity in 7 seconds to drive Pre-Order Now conversions.
asset_strategy.creative_priority: Spec-driven visuals that prove exact fit, FKM material, and no-drill/no-glue installation.
asset_strategy.why_this_asset_mix_wins: Minimum viable set of 5 stills and 5 motion clips delivers all proof points (40.35mm, 0.7mm, FKM, no-drill) in under 7 seconds, matching the reel script beats and hook archetype.

image_blueprint.subject: Cradle Adapter V1 (Monochrome) mounted on Royal Pop case, side view, wrist context implied.
image_blueprint.purpose: Establish product identity and transformation (watch to wrist).
image_blueprint.composition: Rule of thirds, product centred, shallow depth of field, wrist barely visible at edge.
image_blueprint.lighting: Soft diffused key light from top-left, subtle rim light to separate adapter from case.
image_blueprint.background: Neutral gradient (light grey to off-white), no texture.
image_blueprint.product_pose: Adapter fully seated on Royal Pop case, crown notches aligned, strap loop visible.
image_blueprint.text_safe_area: Top 20% and bottom 20% reserved for on-screen text (hook and CTA).
image_blueprint.notes: This is the hero still for the reel cover and first hook frame. Must feel premium and precise.

image_blueprint.subject: Exploded view of Cradle Adapter V1 with Royal Pop case, annotated with 40.35mm, 0.7mm, and 22mm specs.
image_blueprint.purpose: Visually prove exact engineering fit without words.
image_blueprint.composition: Orthographic projection, adapter and case separated by 2cm, specs overlaid as minimalist labels.
image_blueprint.lighting: Flat even lighting, no shadows, high contrast for labels.
image_blueprint.product_pose: Adapter rotated 15° to show retaining lip, case rotated 15° to show socket.
image_blueprint.text_safe_area: None (spec labels are part of the image).
image_blueprint.notes: This still is the core proof asset. Must be clinically clear.

image_blueprint.subject: Close-up of FKM rubber texture and retaining lip (0.7mm) against Royal Pop case edge.
image_blueprint.purpose: Prove material authenticity and precision fit.
image_blueprint.composition: Extreme macro, 1:1 magnification, shallow depth of field (lip in focus, case edge blurred).
image_blueprint.lighting: Raking light from left to highlight texture, subtle fill to avoid harsh shadows.
image_blueprint.product_pose: Adapter seated on case, retaining lip visible as a thin line.
image_blueprint.notes: This is the FKM proof shot. Must feel tactile and premium.

image_blueprint.subject: Cradle Adapter V1 (Arctic Blue) on wrist with Royal Pop, showing strap integration and fit.
image_blueprint.composition: Wrist-centred, watch face visible, adapter and strap in focus, background blurred.
image_blueprint.lighting: Natural diffused light, subtle catch light in strap.
image_blueprint.product_pose: Adapter fully seated, strap adjusted to show lug width (22mm), crown notch aligned.
image_blueprint.notes: This is the transformation shot. Must feel natural and premium.

image_blueprint.subject: All 5 live colourways (Monochrome, Arctic Blue, Cobalt Orange, Green Eight, Otto Rosso) in a minimalist grid.
image_blueprint.purpose: Showcase colour variety to support Pre-Order Now CTA.
image_blueprint.composition: 5 equal squares, each showing adapter on Royal Pop case (side view), no text.
image_blueprint.lighting: Consistent across all squares, soft diffused key light.
image_blueprint.product_pose: Identical to IMG-01 but in each colourway.
image_blueprint.notes: Optional asset. Can be used as a final CTA frame or carousel slide.

motion_blueprint.subject_motion: Adapter and Royal Pop case remain static.
motion_blueprint.camera_motion: Slow push-in (20% over 2s) to emphasise product.
motion_blueprint.prompt: Premium product shot of Cradle Adapter V1 (Monochrome) mounted on Royal Pop case, side view, wrist context implied. Slow push-in camera motion, subtle zoom-out background, shallow depth of field, soft diffused lighting. No text, no distractions.
motion_blueprint.negative_prompt: Blurry, low resolution, distorted perspective, harsh shadows, floating objects, text overlays, chaotic motion, unrealistic colours, competitor products.
motion_blueprint.notes: This is the hero motion clip. Must feel stable and premium. Sync with hook line: '40.35mm. 0.7mm. FKM. No drilling.'

motion_blueprint.subject_motion: Spec labels (40.35mm, 0.7mm, 22mm) animate in sequentially (0.3s each) with a subtle glow.
motion_blueprint.prompt: Exploded view of Cradle Adapter V1 with Royal Pop case, orthographic projection, pure white background. Spec labels (40.35mm, 0.7mm, 22mm) animate in sequentially with a subtle glow effect. No camera motion, no background motion, high contrast for labels.
motion_blueprint.negative_prompt: Blurry, low resolution, distorted perspective, chaotic motion, floating objects, text overlays outside labels, unrealistic colours.
motion_blueprint.notes: Sync with script line: 'Engineered for the Royal Pop’s exact case.'

motion_blueprint.subject_motion: Static (FKM rubber texture and retaining lip).
motion_blueprint.camera_motion: Slow horizontal sweep (15° left to right) to reveal texture and lip detail.
motion_blueprint.prompt: Extreme macro shot of FKM rubber texture and retaining lip (0.7mm) against Royal Pop case edge. Slow horizontal camera sweep (15° left to right), shallow depth of field, raking light to highlight texture. No background motion, no subject motion.
motion_blueprint.negative_prompt: Blurry, low resolution, distorted perspective, chaotic motion, floating objects, text overlays, unrealistic colours, harsh shadows.
motion_blueprint.notes: Sync with script line: '0.7mm retaining lip locks it secure.'

motion_blueprint.subject_motion: Wrist rotates 10° left to right to show strap integration and fit.
motion_blueprint.prompt: Cradle Adapter V1 (Arctic Blue) on wrist with Royal Pop, showing strap integration and fit. Wrist rotates 10° left to right to demonstrate fit and strap adjustment. Natural diffused lighting, neutral bokeh background, shallow depth of field.
motion_blueprint.negative_prompt: Blurry, low resolution, distorted perspective, chaotic motion, floating objects, text overlays, unrealistic skin tones, overly posed wrist.
motion_blueprint.notes: Sync with script line: 'FKM rubber. No scratches. No glue.'

motion_blueprint.subject_motion: Adapter and Royal Pop case remain static.
motion_blueprint.prompt: Premium product shot of Cradle Adapter V1 (Monochrome) mounted on Royal Pop case, side view. Static camera, static subject, static background. Designed for 'Pre-Order Now' CTA text overlay.
motion_blueprint.negative_prompt: Blurry, low resolution, distorted perspective, motion, floating objects, text overlays (except CTA), unrealistic colours.
motion_blueprint.notes: This is the final CTA frame. Must be clean and stable for text overlay. Sync with script line: 'Pre-Order Now.'

asset_dependencies.reason: HERO_PUSH_IN motion clip requires the hero still as source.
SPEC_CALLOUT_MOTION requires the technical board still for spec labels.
MACRO_SWEEP requires the macro still for texture and lip detail.
WRIST_FIT_DEMO requires the wrist shot still for fit demonstration.
COVER_TO_MOTION_TRANSITION reuses the hero still for CTA frame.

build_order.why_first: These are the core hook and proof assets. Required for VID-01 and VID-02.
These clips deliver the hook and first proof points. Can be edited into a 4-second rough cut for early testing.
Required for VID-03 and VID-04, which complete the proof and desire beats.
Complete the 7-second reel body. Sync with script lines 0:04–0:05.
Final CTA frame and optional colourway support. Can be added post-launch if time is tight.

handoff_for_visual_brief.editing_note: Sync motion clips with reel script beats. Use on-screen text from Copy piece (40.35mm, 0.7mm lip, FKM rubber, No drilling, Pre-Order Now). Keep cuts tight (1.5–2s per clip). End on VID-05 with CTA text overlay.

website_truth.verified_disclaimer: Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Swatch Group Ltd or Audemars Piguet.
